scripts.dev: pnpm run prepare:manifest && vite build --watch --mode development
scripts.dev:firefox: cross-env BROWSER_TARGET=firefox pnpm run prepare:manifest && vite build --watch --mode development
scripts.build:firefox: cross-env BROWSER_TARGET=firefox pnpm run prepare:manifest && vite build
scripts.package: pnpm run build && node scripts/package-extension.mjs chrome
scripts.package:firefox: pnpm run build:firefox && node scripts/package-extension.mjs firefox
scripts.package:all: pnpm run package && pnpm run package:firefox
